tasks.subject: Task 0: Schema migration for memory namespace
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add SQLite schema for centralized transcript memory with FTS5 search.

**Files:**
- Create: `migrations/015_memory.sql`
- Test: `internal/store/memory_schema_test.go`

**Acceptance:** memory_sessions, memory_messages, memory_compact_events tables; memory_messages_fts virtual table with content='memory_messages', content_rowid='id', tokenize='unicode61 remove_diacritics 2'; three sync triggers (_ai, _ad, _au); indexes on session and (session, epoch).

**Verify:** `cd /Users/ian/code/arc-relay && CGO_ENABLED=1 go test ./internal/store/ -run TestMemorySchema -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["migrations/015_memory.sql", "internal/store/memory_schema_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd /Users/ian/code/arc-relay && CGO_ENABLED=1 go test ./internal/store/ -run TestMemorySchema -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["memory_sessions table exists", "memory_messages table exists", "memory_compact_events table exists", "memory_messages_fts virtual table keyed to memory_messages.id", "three sync triggers _ai/_ad/_au present", "indexes on session and (session, epoch) created"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 0a: Rework — separate memory DB + migrations-memory package
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Move 015_memory.sql out of the main migrations/ set into a new migrations-memory/ package; open a second *store.DB against /data/memory.db; wire ARC_RELAY_MEMORY_DB_PATH env var.

**Files:**
- Create: `migrations-memory/migrations.go` (with `//go:embed *.sql` + `var FS embed.FS`)
- Move: `migrations/015_memory.sql` → `migrations-memory/001_memory.sql` (use `git mv`)
- Modify: `internal/store/memory_schema_test.go` (open against `migrationsmemory.FS`)
- Modify: `cmd/arc-relay/main.go` (open second store.DB; defer Close + StartBackup)
- Modify: `internal/config/config.go` (add `MemoryDBPath` with envconfig tag)
- Modify: `Dockerfile` (add `ENV ARC_RELAY_MEMORY_DB_PATH=/data/memory.db`)
- Modify: `config.example.toml` (document `memory_db_path`)

**Acceptance:** make test passes; smoke check shows /tmp/relay.db has NO memory_* tables and /tmp/mem.db DOES.

**Verify:** `cd /Users/ian/code/arc-relay-memory-pivot && make test` AND the manual two-DB sqlite3 inspection from plan Step 6.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["migrations-memory/migrations.go", "migrations-memory/001_memory.sql", "internal/store/memory_schema_test.go", "cmd/arc-relay/main.go", "internal/config/config.go", "Dockerfile", "config.example.toml"], "verifyCommand": "cd /Users/ian/code/arc-relay-memory-pivot && make test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["migrations/015_memory.sql removed", "migrations-memory/001_memory.sql exists with identical SQL", "migrations-memory package exports embed.FS", "main.go opens two separate store.DB instances", "ARC_RELAY_MEMORY_DB_PATH env var honored with sensible default", "two-DB smoke check passes (relay.db has no memory_* tables; mem.db has them)"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: MessageStore + FTS5 search
tasks.description:
**Goal:** CRUD + FTS5 BM25 search for memory_messages, mirroring ServerStore.

**Files:** `internal/store/memory_messages.go` + test.

**Acceptance:** NewMessageStore; Insert/BulkInsert(tx); Search(userID, query, opts) BM25; SearchRegex Go regexp fallback; GetSession(sessionID, fromEpoch); user scoping via memory_sessions join.

**Verify:** `CGO_ENABLED=1 go test ./internal/store/ -run TestMessageStore -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/store/memory_messages.go", "internal/store/memory_messages_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd /Users/ian/code/arc-relay && CGO_ENABLED=1 go test ./internal/store/ -run TestMessageStore -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["NewMessageStore constructor", "Insert + BulkInsert in transaction", "Search returns BM25 ranked rows", "SearchRegex falls back to Go regexp", "GetSession respects fromEpoch", "all queries scoped to user_id"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: SessionMemoryStore
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Track transcript file watermarks (path, mtime, bytes_seen).

**Files:** `internal/store/memory_sessions.go` + test.

**Acceptance:** MemorySession struct; Upsert idempotent on session_id; Get; ListByUser most-recent-first; Touch(sessionID, mtime, bytes) for watermark-only update.

**Verify:** `CGO_ENABLED=1 go test ./internal/store/ -run TestSessionMemoryStore -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/store/memory_sessions.go", "internal/store/memory_sessions_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd /Users/ian/code/arc-relay && CGO_ENABLED=1 go test ./internal/store/ -run TestSessionMemoryStore -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["MemorySession struct matches schema", "Upsert idempotent on session_id", "ListByUser most-recent-first", "Touch updates watermark only"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: JSONL transcript parser
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Parse Claude Code's `~/.claude/projects/<project>/<uuid>.jsonl` lines into Message rows + CompactEvent records.

**Files:** `internal/memory/parser.go` + test + `internal/memory/testdata/sample.jsonl` (redacted real fixture).

**Acceptance:** ParseJSONL returns msgs+events+err; user/assistant roles map; tool blocks render `[TOOL:...]`; slash commands collapse to `[SLASH-COMMAND: /name args=...]`; epoch increments on compaction; malformed lines log+skip.

**Verify:** `CGO_ENABLED=1 go test ./internal/memory/ -run TestParseJSONL -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/memory/parser.go", "internal/memory/parser_test.go", "internal/memory/testdata/sample.jsonl"], "verifyCommand": "cd /Users/ian/code/arc-relay && CGO_ENABLED=1 go test ./internal/memory/ -run TestParseJSONL -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["roles map correctly", "tool blocks render as TOOL: lines", "slash commands collapse with prompt-injection guard", "epoch increments on compaction", "malformed lines skipped not fatal"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Ingest service + REST endpoint
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `POST /api/memory/ingest` parses+persists transcript deltas.

**Files:** `internal/memory/service.go`, `internal/web/memory_handlers.go`, `internal/web/memory_handlers_test.go`, modify `internal/server/http.go`.

**Acceptance:** apiAuth wired; 10 MiB body cap via http.MaxBytesReader; idempotent on uuid; response `{messages_added, events_added, bytes_seen}`.

**Verify:** `CGO_ENABLED=1 go test ./internal/web/ -run TestMemoryIngest -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/memory/service.go", "internal/web/memory_handlers.go", "internal/web/memory_handlers_test.go", "internal/server/http.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd /Users/ian/code/arc-relay && CGO_ENABLED=1 go test ./internal/web/ -run TestMemoryIngest -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["POST /api/memory/ingest auth via apiAuth", "10 MiB body cap enforced", "idempotent re-POST", "response shape correct"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Search + extract REST endpoints
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `GET /api/memory/search`, `/api/memory/sessions`, `/api/memory/sessions/{id}` scoped by user_id from bearer.

**Files:** modify `internal/web/memory_handlers.go`, `internal/web/context.go`, add `internal/web/memory_search_test.go`.

**Acceptance:** q/limit/project/session params; 240-char trim snippets; user_id scope enforced; tail+from_epoch on session extract.

**Verify:** `CGO_ENABLED=1 go test ./internal/web/ -run TestMemorySearch -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/web/memory_handlers.go", "internal/web/memory_search_test.go", "internal/web/context.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd /Users/ian/code/arc-relay && CGO_ENABLED=1 go test ./internal/web/ -run TestMemorySearch -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GET /api/memory/search returns hits[]", "GET /api/memory/sessions recent-first", "session extract tail+from_epoch", "user_id scope enforced"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Native MCP server /mcp/memory
tasks.description:
**Goal:** JSON-RPC 2.0 MCP endpoint with `memory_search`, `memory_session_extract`, `memory_recent` under MCPAuth.

**Files:** `internal/mcp/memory/server.go` + test, modify `internal/server/http.go`.

**Acceptance:** tools/list returns 3 with JSONSchema; tools/call returns text content blocks; output prepended with `## RESEARCH ONLY` banner; mounted at `/mcp/memory` and `/mcp/memory/`.

**Verify:** `CGO_ENABLED=1 go test ./internal/mcp/memory/ -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/mcp/memory/server.go", "internal/mcp/memory/server_test.go", "internal/server/http.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd /Users/ian/code/arc-relay && CGO_ENABLED=1 go test ./internal/mcp/memory/ -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["tools/list returns 3 tools", "tools/call memory_search returns hits", "RESEARCH ONLY banner present", "MCPAuth wired"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: arc-sync memory watch
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Tail `~/.claude/projects/**/*.jsonl` and POST deltas.

**Files:** `internal/cli/sync/memory.go` + test, modify `cmd/arc-sync/main.go`, `go.mod`/`go.sum` for fsnotify.

**Acceptance:** watermark in `~/.config/arc-sync/memory_state.json`; fsnotify with 5s poll fallback; `--once` flag; never modifies source JSONL.

**Verify:** `CGO_ENABLED=0 go test ./internal/cli/sync/ -run TestMemoryWatcher -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/cli/sync/memory.go", "internal/cli/sync/memory_test.go", "cmd/arc-sync/main.go", "go.mod", "go.sum"], "verifyCommand": "cd /Users/ian/code/arc-relay && CGO_ENABLED=0 go test ./internal/cli/sync/ -run TestMemoryWatcher -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["watermark persisted per file", "fsnotify with poll fallback", "--once flag for cron", "never mutates source JSONL"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: arc-sync memory search CLI
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Mirror cc-search-chats-plugin's `/search-chat` UX, hitting arc-relay.

**Files:** modify `internal/cli/sync/memory.go` (MemorySearchClient), `cmd/arc-sync/main.go`, add test.

**Acceptance:** `--limit/--project/--session/--json`; safety banner first; `--json` returns wire payload verbatim.

**Verify:** `CGO_ENABLED=0 go test ./internal/cli/sync/ -run TestMemorySearchClient -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/cli/sync/memory.go", "internal/cli/sync/memory_search_test.go", "cmd/arc-sync/main.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd /Users/ian/code/arc-relay && CGO_ENABLED=0 go test ./internal/cli/sync/ -run TestMemorySearchClient -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["--limit/--project/--session/--json flags", "RESEARCH ONLY banner", "--json verbatim wire output"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: /recall slash command
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Native Claude Code slash command wrapping `arc-sync memory search`.

**Files:** `~/.claude/commands/recall.md`, `~/.claude/commands/recall.sh` (chmod +x).

**Acceptance:** allowed-tools restricted to wrapper script; `## RESEARCH ONLY` banner survives; description tells Claude this is recall-only.

**Verify:** Manual — `/recall "BM25"` in fresh session shows banner + hits.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["~/.claude/commands/recall.md", "~/.claude/commands/recall.sh"], "verifyCommand": "manual: /recall \"BM25\" in fresh Claude Code session", "acceptanceCriteria": ["allowed-tools constrained to wrapper", "RESEARCH ONLY banner visible first", "description marks as recall-only"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Stop-hook wakeup + claude-mem cutover
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Stop hook touches a flag file the watcher fsnotifies; disable claude-mem SessionStart push.

**Files:** `~/.claude/hooks/memory-wakeup.sh`, `~/.claude/settings.json` via `update-config` skill, modify `internal/cli/sync/memory.go` (handle wakeup.flag in fsnotify loop).

**Acceptance:** Stop event triggers immediate scan; fresh session no longer dumps observation legend; `/recall` still works; existing code-memory MCP remains in addition (deprecation deferred).

**Verify:** Open fresh session; first 200 lines of context contain no `🎯session 🔴bugfix` legend.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["~/.claude/hooks/memory-wakeup.sh", "~/.claude/settings.json", "internal/cli/sync/memory.go"], "verifyCommand": "manual: open fresh Claude Code session, check no observation legend in SessionStart context", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Stop hook touches wakeup.flag", "watcher reacts to flag in <5s", "claude-mem SessionStart push removed", "/recall still works"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11 (deferred): LLM observations layer
tasks.description:
**Goal (deferred):** Layer claude-mem-style structured observations on the FTS5 store via internal/llm.Client (haiku-4-5).

**Defer signal:** ship 0-10 first; queue this only if FTS5 recall quality is measurably worse than the prior claude-mem flow.

**Sketch:** `migrations/016_memory_observations.sql` (claude-mem schema), `internal/memory/extractor.go` worker, MCP tool `memory_observations_search`.
